name: Mushrooms Rice
steps: In the seave quickly rinse water 3 times
Drain rice and let to dry for 5 min on separate container
In the mixing bowl please mix all ingredients thoroughly and place to cook
After rice is cooked allow to rest for 15-20 min
Gently remove rice and place on flat gastro tray covered with Jay clove.
Place rice and portions into the basket and keep covered with leaf
